prerequisites: An active AWS account with programmatic access (access key ID and secret access key).
An IAM user or role whose credentials are configured here, granted the cloudtrail:LookupEvents permission (Read access level). The Resource element for CloudTrail actions is set to "*".
The AWS region (aws_region_name) where the CloudTrail events you want to read are recorded. LookupEvents only returns events that occurred in that region within the last 90 days.
The AWS rate limit: LookupEvents is limited to two requests per second, per account, per region, so avoid running multiple syncs against the same account and region concurrently.

authMethods.name: AWS access keys (aws_key_id + aws_secret_key)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with an AWS access key ID (aws_key_id) and secret access key (aws_secret_key) belonging to an IAM user or role. The associated identity must hold the cloudtrail:LookupEvents permission so the connector can call the CloudTrail LookupEvents API.

setupSteps.title: Obtain AWS access credentials
setupSteps.body: In the AWS console, create or use an IAM user (or role) and generate an access key ID and secret access key. Ensure the identity is granted the cloudtrail:LookupEvents permission.

setupSteps.title: Enter your AWS credentials
setupSteps.body: Set aws_key_id to your AWS access key ID and aws_secret_key to your AWS secret access key. Both fields are required and are stored as secrets.

setupSteps.title: Set the AWS region
setupSteps.body: Set aws_region_name (required) to the AWS region whose CloudTrail events you want to read. LookupEvents returns events that occurred in that region within the last 90 days.

setupSteps.title: Optionally set the sync start date
setupSteps.body: Set start_date (optional) to define the beginning of the period to sync events from.

setupSteps.title: Optionally filter lookup results
setupSteps.body: Set lookup_attributes_filter (optional) to narrow results by an AttributeKey and AttributeValue applied to the LookupEvents request. Supported attribute keys for management events are AWS access key, Event ID, Event name, Event source, Read only, Resource name, Resource type, and User name. The API accepts only one lookup attribute per request.
